title: elymus multisetus
intro: Elymus multisetus, also known as Puccinellia multisetus or multiset pusit, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mongolian and Chinese herbal traditions, for its purported medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and skin conditions. Elymus multisetus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
